mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rpt_operation_monthly ( stat_month, project_id, building_id, format_type, revenue_amount, floating_rent_amount, avg_revenue_per_sqm, passenger_flow, avg_daily_passenger, change_count, change_rent_impact, expiring_contracts, terminated_contracts, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{r.statMonth}, #{r.projectId}, COALESCE(#{r.buildingId}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.formatType}, ''), COALESCE(#{r.revenueAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.floatingRentAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.avgRevenuePerSqm}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.passengerFlow}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.avgDailyPassenger}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.changeCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.changeRentImpact}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.expiringContracts}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.terminatedContracts}, 0), 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE revenue_amount = VALUES(revenue_amount), floating_rent_amount = VALUES(floating_rent_amount), avg_revenue_per_sqm = VALUES(avg_revenue_per_sqm), passenger_flow = VALUES(passenger_flow), avg_daily_passenger = VALUES(avg_daily_passenger), change_count = VALUES(change_count), change_rent_impact = VALUES(change_rent_impact), expiring_contracts = VALUES(expiring_contracts), terminated_contracts = VALUES(terminated_contracts), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(stat_month) FROM rpt_operation_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type = ''

SELECT * FROM rpt_operation_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type = '' AND stat_month = #{statMonth}
ORDER BY project_id

SELECT project_id AS projectId, stat_month AS statMonth, ROUND(expiring_contracts * 0.3) AS expiringWithin30, ROUND(expiring_contracts * 0.3) AS expiringWithin60, ROUND(expiring_contracts * 0.4) AS expiringWithin90, expiring_contracts AS totalExpiring FROM rpt_operation_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type = '' AND stat_month = #{statMonth}
ORDER BY expiring_contracts DESC

SELECT project_id AS projectId, stat_month AS statMonth, SUM(revenue_amount) AS revenueAmount, SUM(passenger_flow) AS passengerFlow, SUM(change_count) AS changeCount, SUM(change_rent_impact) AS changeRentImpact, SUM(terminated_contracts) AS terminatedContracts, ROUND(AVG(avg_revenue_per_sqm), 2) AS avgRevenuePerSqm, SUM(expiring_contracts) AS expiringContracts FROM rpt_operation_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type = '' AND stat_month = #{statMonth}
GROUP BY project_id, stat_month ORDER BY revenue_amount DESC

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, SUM(passenger_flow) AS passengerFlow, SUM(avg_daily_passenger) AS avgDailyPassenger FROM rpt_operation_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND building_id = 0 AND format_type = ''
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id ORDER BY stat_month, project_id
